generated_oml:
instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A lab-scale gantry crane system consisting of a physical crane and its controller, designed for research and educational applications in cyber-physical systems. Key characteristics include public availability, open-source nature, and reliance on freely available software, making it suitable for reproducible experimentation in digital twin research areas such as continuous validation, fault detection, and system evolution."
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, CraneController
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical component of the gantry crane system"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller component for the physical crane"
]

instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing physical crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane operational state time-series data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingEnabler
]

instance LoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Application for logging and storing crane data in TimescaleDB using MQTT transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Graphical interface for real-time crane system visualization using C4 Model"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time control adjustments using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for comparing physical and digital twin behaviors"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub-based version control for digital twin model management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization using context and container diagrams to represent software components and their interactions as specified in [5]"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to store and retrieve time-series operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataStorageAction
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization through graphical interfaces for monitoring system states"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for dynamic adjustment of crane operations based on real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneOperationOptimizationAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to compare physical and digital model behaviors, ensuring accuracy and reliability"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataStorageAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic storage of crane operational data for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of crane system states for monitoring purposes"
]

instance CraneOperationOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of crane parameters for optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation insights ensuring digital twin accuracy against physical system"
]

instance AirQualityManagementExemplar : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Air Quality Management exemplar providing runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction applications for indoor air quality management in construction engineering contexts"
]

instance AirQualityVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization for indoor air quality management in construction engineering"
]

instance AirQualitySimulation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation applications for indoor air quality management"
]

instance AirQualityPrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction applications for virus spread prevention in indoor environments"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application utilizes the Physical Crane Interface to execute movement commands derived from trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service. The Continuous Validation Service monitors discrepancies between real-time measurements and simulated trajectories for feedback. Specific command types, message formats, validation/authentication mechanisms, conflict resolution procedures, and execution confirmation details are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, employing containerization technologies for deployment in an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between services is facilitated via an MQTT Broker. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar utilizes AutomationML for digital twin modeling (reference [14]) and the C4 Model for architecture visualization (reference [5]), while other exemplars use ad-hoc approaches without specific standardization frameworks."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system employs a Continuous Validation Service that continuously compares executed trajectory measurements with simulated trajectories, calculates distance metrics against an acceptable threshold, and notifies operators via the Grafana dashboard upon threshold breaches for corrective actions."
]
